positive: A stylized, minimalist depiction of a celestial compass rose interwoven with abstract floral mandalas. The central subject is a radiant, glowing sunburst at the core, surrounded by symmetrical, geometric patterns formed by stylized constellations, lunar phases, and delicate watercolor-like botanicals. Use a deep indigo and burnt orange color palette with metallic gold accents for high contrast. The composition must be perfectly symmetrical, designed as a repeat-friendly, clean silhouette suitable for apparel printing. Graphic design quality, vibrant yet balanced colors, intricate linework, high detail, vector art style, central focus.
negative: photorealistic, grainy, blurry, artifacts, text, signature, watermark, logo, low contrast, noise, messy background, extra limbs, bad anatomy, sketch, grayscale
